content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is stocky, warm-faced, usually smells like butter or garlic, which honestly is a vibe. He's a chef or aspiring chef — brings leftover pastries to the coffee shop sometimes and they're incredible. We bonded over food; I told him about my mom's jollof rice and he wanted the recipe immediately. He's genuine and easygoing. I think he sees me as a buddy who appreciates good food. I know he's working his way up in some restaurant kitchen and dreams of his own place someday. We've shared beers on the rooftop a few times.

I know he's working his way up in some restaurant kitchen and dreams of his own place someday. We've shared beers on the rooftop a few times.
